creator: dmgk@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 189867
aespipe-2.4e.patch

* Update to 2.4e
* Disable build-time x86/amd64/padlock/intelaes auto-detection which may produce broken binaries, add explicit ASM, INTEL and PADLOCK options instead.

Changes:
  - Added workaround for gpg 2 pinentry-mode bug.

QA:
  poudriere testport: OK (11a, 10i)
